default.purpose: Primary LogicCut video translation structure: local vocal separation, local ASR diarization, LLM translation, selectable TTS gateway, alignment, subtitles and mixdown

default.source: local /tts service on 8321 or Fish Speech adapter on 8392
default.purpose: Default TTS engine preset for LogicCut video translation
Chinese-focused TTS backend; supports the indextts2_decoupled ref strategy when enabled

default.source: OmniVoice Studio API through LogicCut /tts adapter on 8391
default.purpose: Optional OmniVoice TTS backend for multilingual synthesis experiments
Fast local ASR preview and smoke tests
Quality-critical translation via large model provider. Local NLLB is not used for production video translation.
Secondary ASR missing-sentence check and TTS posterior ASR verification
Invisible audio watermark generator/detector used by generated speech

gated_optional.purpose: Default local speaker diarization for LogicCut video translation
Speaker embedding model required by pyannote/speaker-diarization-3.1
